The ImplementationGuide uses package hl7.fhir.us.core#5.0.1 released on 2022-06-22, but the most recent appropriate version is 7.0.0. This reference is getting old and the more recent version should be considered

This SNOMED-CT based include has some concepts with semantic tags (FSN terms) and some without (preferred terms) - check that this is what is intended (examples for FSN: [Abdomen (body structure), Ankle region structure (body structure), Structure of left ankle (body structure), Structure of right ankle (body structure), Structure of precordium (body structure)] and examples for no FSN: [Arteriovenous fistula (morphologic abnormality), Structure of axillary fossa (body structure) 76261009 |Skin structure of axilla (body structure)|])
